query: extreme harsh chiaroscuro single light source dramatic black abstract shadow
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: extreme chiaroscuro — single-source dramatic, abstract black/shadow play, deep contrast pushed to graphic abstraction

response.objective_caption: A black and white photograph of a long corridor with large square floor tiles receding toward a distant light source. A narrow beam of light illuminates the center path, casting angular shadows across the grid pattern. On the right side, the lower legs and feet of a person stand in a columned opening, casting an elongated shadow onto the tiles.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A black and white photograph of a long corridor with large square floor tiles receding toward a distant light source, rendered with extreme underexposure that buries most of the scene in crushed shadows. A narrow beam of light illuminates the center path, casting angular shadows across the grid. On the right side, the lower legs and feet of a person are partially hidden and cropped by a column and the frame edge, reinforcing an atmosphere of dread and isolation.
